mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_credit_account (tenant_id, user_id, balance) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, 0) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS userDisplayName, a.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, a.balance AS balance, a.frozen_balance AS frozenBalance, a.balance + a.frozen_balance AS totalBalance, a.created_at AS createdAt, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM user_credit_account a INNER JOIN user_account u ON u.id = a.user_id INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

UPDATE user_credit_account SET balance = balance + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND balance + #{delta} >= 0 RETURNING balance - #{delta} AS balance_before, balance AS balance_after, frozen_balance AS frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance AS frozen_balance_after
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_transaction (tenant_id, user_id, direction, delta, balance_before, balance_after, frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance_after, reason, operator_id, operator_name, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{direction}, #{delta}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{frozenBalanceBefore}, #{frozenBalanceAfter}, #{reason}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, NOW())

INSERT INTO credit_transaction (tenant_id, user_id, direction, delta, balance_before, balance_after, frozen_balance_before, frozen_balance_after, reason, source, card_id, operator_id, operator_name, created_at) VALUES (#{txn.tenantId}, #{txn.userId}, #{txn.direction}, #{txn.delta}, #{txn.balanceBefore}, #{txn.balanceAfter}, #{txn.frozenBalanceBefore}, #{txn.frozenBalanceAfter}, #{txn.reason}, 'CARD_REDEEM', #{cardId}, #{txn.operatorId}, #{txn.operatorName}, NOW())
